notableEvents.label: Trevor Story GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Trevor Story grounds into a double play, third baseman Ke'Bryan Hayes to second baseman Matt McLain to first baseman Sal Stewart. Roman Anthony out at 2nd. Trevor Story out at 1st.
